hero.title: Create legally-sound contracts in 2 minutes
hero.subtitle: Generate, preview, and share legal documents instantly. No signup required to start - see the value before you commit.

walkthrough.subtitle: How It Works
walkthrough.title: Visual 3 - Step Walkthrough
walkthrough.description: Creating a legal contract with Snaplegal is simple and stress-free. Just follow three quick steps — answer guided question

0.title: Answer the Guided Questions Carefully
0.description: Simply choose a template and respond to clear, step-by-step prompts. No legal jargon, just plain language.

1.title: Preview draft + plain-English summary.
1.description: See your contract instantly in a split view — full legal draft on one side, easy-to-read summary on the other.

2.title: Sign Digitally to Finalize Your Agreement
2.description: When you're ready, e-sign securely and store or share your contract with confidence.

templates.subtitle: Choose Templates
templates.title: Popular Templates
templates.description: Get started faster with our most used templates, from NDAs and freelance agreements to leases and service contracts. Each template is customizable and comes with a plain-English summary so you always know exactly what you're signing.

testimonials.subtitle: Testimonial
testimonials.title: What they say after using our product
testimonials.description: Trusted by freelancers, entrepreneurs, and small teams, SnapLegal makes contract creation simple, fast, and reliable. Here's what our users have to say.

testimonials.text: SnapLegal saved me hours. I created an NDA in minutes and felt confident with the plain-English summary.
As a small business owner, I love how simple it is. The Pro plan's multi-party signing is a game changer.
The contract templates are comprehensive and easy to customize. Perfect for my consulting business.
SnapLegal made contract creation so much easier. The e-signature feature saves me tons of time.

statistics.subtitle: Our Impact
statistics.title: Trusted by Thousands
statistics.description: Join thousands of users who trust SnapLegal for their contract needs.

cta.title: Start your contract today
cta.description: Simple, fast, and secure. Create legal contracts in minutes with guided steps and plain-English summaries

hero.title: Your Strategic Partner for Simple, Secure Contracts
hero.description: SnapLegal was built to make legal contracts accessible to everyone — freelancers, entrepreneurs, and small teams. Our platform combines ready-to-use templates, AI-powered assistance, and secure digital signing to save you time and remove complexity. We're committed to helping individuals and businesses create, understand, and manage agreements with confidence.

ourStory.subtitle: About Snaplegal
ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: With a clear focus on simplicity and trust, SnapLegal helps individuals and small businesses create professional contracts without the usual complexity or cost. By combining AI-powered guidance, plain-English summaries, and secure e-signatures, we ensure every agreement is fast, clear, and reliable.
ourStory.paragraph1: Snaplegal is dedicated to making contract creation easy and trustworthy for individuals and small businesses. Our platform leverages AI to provide straightforward guidance, clear summaries, and secure electronic signatures, ensuring that every agreement is quick, transparent, and dependable.
ourStory.paragraph2: At SnapLegal, we prioritize simplicity and reliability, enabling individuals and small businesses to draft professional contracts effortlessly. Our innovative use of AI, combined with easy-to-understand summaries and safe e-signatures, guarantees that every contract is processed swiftly and clearly.
